note: Default behaviour: OpenWatchlists fetches each list directly from source_url at runtime (cached per-instance). The bundled .txt files are offline fallbacks — used when network fetch fails or when live=False. Entries WITHOUT a 'file' field are live-only (no bundled snapshot). Placeholder DUMMY* symbols come from NSE during corporate-action transitions and pass through unchanged.

nifty50.name: Nifty 50
nifty50.description: Flagship NSE benchmark: 50 of the largest and most liquid Indian blue-chip companies.

nifty_next50.name: Nifty Next 50
nifty_next50.description: Stocks ranked 51-100 by free-float market cap on NSE.

nifty100.name: Nifty 100
nifty100.description: Top 100 NSE stocks by free-float market cap (Nifty 50 + Nifty Next 50).

nifty200.name: Nifty 200
nifty200.description: Top 200 NSE stocks by free-float market cap (large + mid).

nifty500.name: Nifty 500
nifty500.description: Top 500 NSE stocks — covers ~96% of total free-float market cap.

banknifty.name: Bank Nifty
banknifty.description: Most-liquid banking stocks on NSE — also the underlying for Bank Nifty derivatives.

nifty_metal.name: Nifty Metal
nifty_metal.description: Ferrous and non-ferrous metals sector constituents.

nifty_energy.name: Nifty Energy
nifty_energy.description: Oil & gas, power, and renewable energy constituents.

nifty_financial_services.name: Nifty Financial Services
nifty_financial_services.description: Banks, NBFCs, insurance, and capital-markets infrastructure stocks.

nifty_midcap50.name: Nifty Midcap 50
nifty_midcap50.description: 50 most-liquid mid-cap stocks from the Nifty Midcap 150 universe.

nifty_smallcap50.name: Nifty Smallcap 50
nifty_smallcap50.description: 50 most-liquid small-cap stocks from the Nifty Smallcap 250 universe.

nifty_smallcap100.name: Nifty Smallcap 100
nifty_smallcap100.description: Top 100 small-cap NSE stocks by free-float market cap.

nifty_midsmallcap400.name: Nifty MidSmallcap 400
nifty_midsmallcap400.description: Mid-cap + small-cap combined (Nifty Midcap 150 ∪ Nifty Smallcap 250).

nifty_microcap250.name: Nifty Microcap 250
nifty_microcap250.description: Top 250 stocks beyond the Nifty 500 universe, ranked by market cap.

nifty_totalmarket.name: Nifty Total Market
nifty_totalmarket.description: Nifty 500 + Nifty Microcap 250 — broadest NSE index in this family.
